熱刺是一間座落英國倫敦北部托定咸區的職業足球會
從1882年成立至今已經擁有過百年歷史，現時競逐於英格蘭超級聯賽；
球會主場為熱刺球場，球會的拉丁文格言 ”Audere est Facere (To Dare Is To Do)” 則意謂「敢作敢為」


榮譽：

甲組聯賽 冠軍：1950/1951、1960/1961
足總盃 冠軍：1900/1901、1920/1921、1960/1961、1961/1962、1966/1967、1980/1981、1981/1982、1990/1991
聯賽盃 冠軍：1970/1971、1972/1973、1998/1999、2007/2008
歐洲盃賽冠軍盃 冠軍：1962/1963
歐洲足協杯 冠軍：1971/1972、1983/1984
賽馬會傑志中心挑戰盃 冠軍：2017/2018
國際冠軍盃 冠軍：2018/2019

I warned Tottenham fans 2 years ago when we sold Kyle Walker that Kieran Trippier was not a suitable replacement. That was shown when Trippier got torn to shreds by Anthony Martial in our last home game against Man Utd where we lost 2-1.

Consistently this season Kieran Trippier has proven himself to be an absolute liability. Loss at home vs Liverpool (1-2), loss at home vs Wolves (1-3), penalty giveaway at Wolves (2-3), Chelsea loss away (0-2), Man City loss at home (0-1), Man Utd loss at home (0-1), Barcelona at home 1st goal (2-4), Ajax goal at home (0-1), both Ajax goals away.

The fact is the blame rests on Poch for not seeing our obvious weak link and for continually playing him. The fault also lies on the board for not selling him and reinforcing in January.

I'd hate to lay the blame at a single player but our problems lie as a result of Kieran Tripper this season. All Spurs fans must come together to demand his contract be immediately terminated.
